textPlain: I thought it was going to be about coaxing AI models to perform better using psychological techniques. But it's about humans. How drab.

If you're interested on this topic, I think you'd like https://cyberpsychology.eu/'Cyberpsychology: Journal of Psychosocial Research on Cyberspace is a diamond open access, online, peer-reviewed scholarly journal published by Masaryk University.'
